name: Tangerine-Berry Salads
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the banana into pieces for a blender or food processor.
2. Add sour cream to the blender or food processor.
3. Cover and blend on high speed until smooth, about 1 minute.
4. Cut tangerines crosswise into 1/4-inch slices.
5. Spoon about 1/4 cup of banana mixture onto individual serving plates.
6. Top with tangerine slices, blackberries, and blueberries.
4 SERVINGS; 130 CALORIES PER SERVING.
